name: arkadas-erp
description: Arkadaş Özel Eğitim ve Rehabilitasyon Merkezi - ERP Sistemi

scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:docker && concurrently --kill-others --kill-signal SIGTERM -n strapi,web,mobile,mebbis,ai -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow "npm run dev:strapi" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:mobile" "npm run dev:mebbis" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.dev:docker: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile core --profile infra up -d --wait
scripts.dev:mobile: cd mobile && EXPO_ROUTER_APP_ROOT=./app npm run start
scripts.build:all: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && concurrently "npm run build:strapi" "npm run build:web" "npm run build:mebbis" "npm run build:ai"
scripts.build:mobile: cd mobile && eas build --platform all --profile production --local
scripts.build:ai: echo 'AI Service: No build step required (Python)'
scripts.start:all: npm run start:docker && concurrently --kill-others --kill-signal SIGTERM -n strapi,web,mebbis,ai -c blue,green,cyan,yellow "npm run start:strapi" "npm run start:web" "npm run start:mebbis" "npm run start:ai"
scripts.start:mobile: cd mobile && EXPO_ROUTER_APP_ROOT=./app npx expo start --no-dev --minify
scripts.start:docker: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile core --profile features up -d
scripts.stop:all: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml --profile "*" down --remove-orphans && npx kill-port 3000 1337 4000 8000 8080 8082 8081
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:strapi && npm run install:web && npm run install:mobile && npm run install:mebbis && npm run install:ai && docker compose pull
scripts.install:mebbis: cd mebbis-service && npm install && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.install:ai: cd ai-service && python3 -m venv venv && ./venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.clean:all: concurrently "npm run clean:strapi" "npm run clean:web" "npm run clean:mobile" "npm run clean:mebbis"
scripts.clean:strapi: cd strapi && npx rimraf node_modules .cache build
scripts.clean:mebbis: cd mebbis-service && npx rimraf node_modules dist
scripts.lint: concurrently "npm run lint --prefix web" "npm run lint --prefix strapi"
scripts.test:all: concurrently -n web,mobile,mebbis,ai "npm run test:web" "npm run test:mobile" "npm run test:mebbis" "npm run test:ai"

author: Arkadaş Özel Eğitim
